Remortgage applicants must have owned property for at least 6 months.
Sub-sales and back-to-back transactions where seller owned for less than 6 months are not acceptable.
Freehold/superior leasehold acquisition followed immediately by grant of sub-lease to borrower is considered a sub-sale.
Assignable, Fulfilment, Assisted, Assignment, Novation, and Transferable contracts are not acceptable.
Irrevocable powers of attorney for intervening sellers are not acceptable.
Report any Unilateral Notice registered against the freehold title.
5.2.1: Assignable contracts and irrevocable powers of attorney for intervening sellers are not acceptable.
